title: appstore-precheck LLM eval case
description: One labelled evaluation case for Pierre's deep-review layer. Each case targets exactly one of the 28 checks, ships a minimal self-contained fixture, and carries a human-confirmed expected outcome. Cases with label_confirmed=false are counted as UNLABELED and excluded from headline metrics.

id.description: Unique case id; must equal the case filename without .json

check_id.description: Target check number from pierre-deep-review.md (table order)

tier.description: Must match the check's tier: B for checks 4, 5, 7, 10, 15, 28; A otherwise

guideline.description: Apple guideline reference as written in the check table, e.g. "2.2" or "5.1.1(ii)"

expected.description: finding = REVIEW-FINDING expected; pass = REVIEW-PASS expected; not-applicable = REVIEW-PASS with 'not applicable' wording expected

rationale.description: One-line human rationale for the label

label_confirmed.description: true only after a human has reviewed fixture + label; false = UNLABELED in the scorecard

fixture.description: Fixture directory relative to eval/dataset/, trailing slash required

fetched_urls.description: Pre-fetched URL contents keyed by kind (e.g. privacy, support). Substitutes Pierre's live WebFetch so eval runs are deterministic and offline-scoreable.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes for maintainers (not sent to the model)
